attributes.action: Review all employment laws relating to unfair treatment in the workplace
attributes.additional_details: Many employees experience unfair treatment, bullying or exclusion at work that may not fall under protected characteristics in the Equality Act 2010. I believe this can leave workers without proper legal protection or support. I believe all forms of unfair treatment & bullying in the workplace should be taken seriously and addressed equally under employment law to create fairer, safer, and more respectful workplaces for everyone.
attributes.background: I want the Government to review all employment laws to ensure all forms of unfair treatment in the workplace are treated equally – not mainly those linked to protected characteristics. I feel employees facing unfair or targeted treatment should have equal legal protection and access to justice.

signatures_by_constituency.mp: Rt Hon Sir Jeremy Wright KC MP
signatures_by_constituency.name: Kenilworth and Southam
